items.name: Noir Sculpted Tailored Coat
items.description:
A structured black tailored coat designed to contour the silhouette with confident elegance. Clean lines, sculpted tailoring, and a cinched waist create a timeless statement piece that blends modern polish with classic sophistication. A powerful staple for elevated styling and refined avatar looks.
